/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/CustomControlZ.dir/CustomControlZ_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CustomControlZ.dir/src/platform/platform_macos.mm.o CMakeFiles/CustomControlZ.dir/src/mac/GameEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CustomControlZ.dir/src/mac/TrayIcon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CustomControlZ.dir/src/mac/SettingsWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CustomControlZ.dir/src/mac/main_mac.cpp.o -o CustomControlZ.app/Contents/MacOS/CustomControlZ -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets -framework AppKit -framework CoreGraphics -framework ApplicationServices -framework CoreFoundation /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
